texto: Who does not tremble when he considers how to deal with his wife For not only is he bound to love her but so to live with her that he may return her to God pure and without stain when God who gave shall demand His own again.
explicacao: Citação de Henry VIII of England sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Who does not tremble when he considers how to deal with his wife For not only is he bound to love…” articula amor, historical-romance, reflexao em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
